description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark-colored roof and a combination of vertical wood paneling and dark cladding on the exterior walls. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house features a fenced yard with greenery, including bushes and a tree, and a driveway leading to a detached garage. The main entrance is set back behind a low fence, with a small patio area visible. The structure is rectangular with clean, geometric lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and simplicity. The overall design is sleek and urban, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with wood and dark cladding, large windows, a flat roof, and a fenced yard with a detached garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the detached garage, fenced yard, and a large bush near the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main facade with large windows, wood paneling, and the garage to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patio area, low fence, and a secondary entrance with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, greenery, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry behind a low fence, with a simple door and small patio area, no prominent decorative elements
